sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n63837" key="loipa/dios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λοιπ-άδιος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ᾰ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">α</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype></foreign>, prob. <sense id="n63837.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">λοιπός</ref></xr>, Sch.D.T.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.542</biblScope> </bibl> H.</sense> </entryFree>
